languages.text: "Воистину, Бог-Император явил мне чудо! Наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана отвори{mf|л|ла} контейнер!"
"Truly, the God-Emperor has revealed a miracle to me! The heir of Seberian has opened the container!"
languages.original_text: "Воистину, Бог-Император явил мне чудо! Наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана отвори{mf|л|ла} контейнер!"

traits.locale_text: "Truly, the God-Emperor has revealed a miracle to me! The heir of Seberian has opened the container!"
"Truly, the God-Emperor has revealed a miracle to me! The heir of Seberian has opened the container!"
"Truly, the God-Emperor has revealed a miracle to me! The heir of Seberian has opened the container!"
"Truly, the God-Emperor has revealed a miracle to me! The heir of Seberian has opened the container!"

languages.text: “神皇显灵了！塞贝里安的继承人打开了容器！”
languages.original_text: "Truly, the God-Emperor has revealed a miracle to me! The heir of Seberian has opened the container!"

traits.locale_text: “神皇显灵了！塞贝里安的继承人打开了容器！”

languages.text: "Gerçekten de Tanrı İmparator bana bir mucize gösterdi! Seberian'ın vârisi konteyneri açtı!"
languages.original_text: "Truly, the God-Emperor has revealed a miracle to me! The heir of Seberian has opened the container!"

traits.locale_text: "Gerçekten de Tanrı İmparator bana bir mucize gösterdi! Seberian'ın vârisi konteyneri açtı!"

languages.text: « L'Empereur-Dieu m'a révélé un miracle ! L'{mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian a ouvert le caisson ! »
languages.original_text: "Truly, the God-Emperor has revealed a miracle to me! The heir of Seberian has opened the container!"

traits.locale_text: « L'Empereur-Dieu m'a révélé un miracle ! L'{mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian a ouvert le caisson ! »

languages.text: «¡El Dios Emperador me ha mostrado un verdadero milagro! ¡{mf|El|La} hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian ha abierto el contenedor!».
languages.original_text: "Truly, the God-Emperor has revealed a miracle to me! The heir of Seberian has opened the container!"

traits.locale_text: «¡El Dios Emperador me ha mostrado un verdadero milagro! ¡{mf|El|La} hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian ha abierto el contenedor!».

languages.text: "Der Gottimperator hat mit wahrhaftig ein Wunder offenbart! Seberians {mf|Erbe|Erbin} hat den Behälter geöffnet!"
languages.original_text: "Truly, the God-Emperor has revealed a miracle to me! The heir of Seberian has opened the container!"

traits.locale_text: "Der Gottimperator hat mit wahrhaftig ein Wunder offenbart! Seberians {mf|Erbe|Erbin} hat den Behälter geöffnet!"

languages.text: 「まことに、神帝陛下が私に奇跡をお示しくださった！ セベリアンの後継者が、容器を開けたのだ！」
languages.original_text: "Truly, the God-Emperor has revealed a miracle to me! The heir of Seberian has opened the container!"

traits.locale_text: 「まことに、神帝陛下が私に奇跡をお示しくださった！ セベリアンの後継者が、容器を開けたのだ！」
